body: ## Environment - **Version**: 0.68.0 - **URL**: https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/ - **User Agent**: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 - **Worker**: wasm worker - **Mode**: manual - **Status**: Ручной режим - **Diagnostics**: off - **Timestamp**: 2026-05-19T15:00:02.728Z ## User Context - **UI Language**: ru - **UI Language Preference**: auto - **Theme Preference**: auto - **UI Skin**: flat - **Chat Style**: cards - **Composer Style**: flat - **Composer Action**: attach - **Browser Language**: ru - **Browser Languages**: ru, en-US, en, ru-RU - **Locale**: ru - **Time Zone**: Europe/Samara - **Color Scheme**: light - **Preferred Location**: not set - **Guess Probability**: 100% - **Temperature**: 0.7 - **Viewport**: 1536x730 - **Screen**: 1536x864 @1.25x - **Platform**: Windows - **Online**: yes - **Location Inference**: time zone / locale only; exact geolocation was not requested ## Dialog No messages have been sent yet. ## Reproduction Steps 1. Open https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/ 2. Use the demo until the issue occurs 3. Click Report issue ## Description ## Attach full memory (optional) Click **Export memory** in the topbar to save `formal-ai-memory.lino`, then attach it as a [GitHub Gist](https://gist.github.com) or wrap it in a `.zip` first. Redact sensitive content before uploading. See the [upload-memory guide](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/main/docs/upload-memory.md) for the full walkthrough. Bottom left block with tools inside the block does not fit at Chrome screen resolution Version: 148.0.7778.168 (official build) (64 bit) 1920 × 1080.

comments.body: the same in Safari. So we need to make sure all tools UI can be always smaller than the panel. So it always fits, and no horizontal scroll. Also we should left panel vs chat horizontally resizable, so user can adjust width on non-mobile views.

title: formal-ai demo issue report
